items.definition_en: A tight-fitting shirt designed to support muscles during exercise.
items.example_en: He wore a compression shirt for his workout.

items.definition_en: A sleeveless top worn for athletic activities.
items.example_en: She wore an athletic tank to yoga class.

items.definition_en: Special gloves worn by goalkeepers in football for grip and protection.
items.example_en: He put on his goalkeeper gloves before the match.

items.definition_en: Loose-fitting shorts worn for playing basketball.
items.example_en: He changed into his basketball shorts after school.

items.definition_en: A warm, weatherproof jacket worn for skiing.
items.example_en: She packed her ski jacket for the trip.

items.definition_en: A one-piece outfit worn by triathletes for all three events.
items.example_en: He bought a new triathlon suit for the competition.

items.definition_en: A durable, collared shirt worn by rugby players.
items.example_en: She wore a striped rugby shirt on game day.

items.definition_en: A special uniform used for practicing judo.
items.example_en: He changed into his judo gi before training.

items.definition_en: A rubber suit worn for warmth while swimming or diving.
items.example_en: She put on her wetsuit to surf in cold water.

items.definition_en: Padded cycling shorts held up by shoulder straps.
items.example_en: He prefers wearing a cycling bib for long rides.

items.definition_en: A protective pad worn over the lower leg in sports.
items.example_en: All players must wear a shin guard during the match.

items.definition_en: A hard helmet worn to protect the head in ice hockey.
items.example_en: He made sure his ice hockey helmet fit properly.

items.definition_en: Cushioned socks designed for physical activities.
items.example_en: She always wears athletic socks with her sneakers.

items.definition_en: A thin garment worn next to the skin for warmth and comfort.
items.example_en: He wore a base layer under his ski outfit.

items.definition_en: A padded jacket worn for protection in fencing.
items.example_en: The fencing jacket must be zipped up during practice.

items.definition_en: A tight, one-piece garment worn in gymnastics or dance.
items.example_en: She wore her new leotard to gymnastics class.

items.definition_en: A tight sleeve worn on the arm for compression and support.
items.example_en: He wore a sports arm sleeve for his tennis match.

items.definition_en: A special shirt worn by football goalkeepers.
items.example_en: The goalkeeper jersey is usually a bright color.

items.definition_en: Insulated pants designed for skiing.
items.example_en: She bought new ski pants for the holiday.

items.definition_en: A colored vest worn to identify teams during training.
items.example_en: Players wore a training bib for the scrimmage.
